entries.description: MCP server that returns a vendor's AudienceScore: the percent of verified thumbs-up across reviews each gated by cryptographic proof the reviewer really transacted with or participated in what they reviewed, with a Wilson 95% lower bound and sample size, as an Ed25519-signed manifest the caller can independently recompute from public data. A vendor with too few verified reviews returns a not-displayed manifest rather than a fabricated number.
representativeQueries: are this vendor's reviews real or fake
how trustworthy is this seller's rating
what percent of this course's reviews are cryptographically verified
show the proof-backed audience score for this vendor
